about.title: Three decades of dental craftsmanship
about.subtitle: From a single lab in Amman to a fully digital manufacturing partner trusted by dentists across the region.

founded.title: Founded
founded.body: AG Dental Lab was founded by Abdullatif Ghatasheh.

digital.title: Digital Pioneer
digital.body: First dental lab in Jordan using digital CAD/CAM zirconia.

rebrand.title: AG Dental Lab
rebrand.body: Rebranded and became AG Dental Lab.

services.title: A complete digital dental portfolio
services.subtitle: Every restoration produced in-house with an integrated digital workflow - from scan to delivery.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.p1: We are committed to providing integrated digital dental services including dental restorations, zirconia milling, precision metal fabrication, 3D printing, and technical support for dentists.
mission.p2: Built on 35+ years of expertise and global quality standards, we deliver precise, reliable, and innovative solutions that improve clinical success and patient satisfaction.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.p1: To become the leading regional reference in integrated digital dental solutions by combining 30+ years of expertise with advanced digital manufacturing technologies.
vision.p2: We aim to elevate dental care quality and deliver better outcomes for dentists and patients.

work.title: Craftsmanship you can see
work.subtitle: A curated gallery of our finest restorations. Images coming soon.

why.title: The partner dentists rely on
why.subtitle: Built for clinicians who need dependable communication, clean workflows, and restoration quality that stays consistent from one case to the next.

reasons.title: Predictable Quality
reasons.body: Consistent, repeatable results on every single case.

reasons.title: Pioneer in Jordan
reasons.body: First lab in Jordan to adopt digital CAD/CAM zirconia.

reasons.title: Trusted Warranty
reasons.body: Confidence backed by a dependable guarantee.

reasons.title: Direct Communication
reasons.body: Talk straight to the lab, no middlemen.

reasons.title: Ongoing Follow-up
reasons.body: We stay with each case until it's perfect.

reasons.title: Long-Term Partnership
reasons.body: We grow together with our dentist partners.

reasons.title: Integrated Digital System
reasons.body: One seamless workflow from scan to delivery.

contact.title: Let's craft perfect smiles together
contact.subtitle: Partner with a lab that treats your cases like its own. Reach out or track an existing case in seconds.

footer.tagline: Your Partner in Perfect Smiles. A digital dental laboratory delivering precise, reliable, and innovative solutions since 1994.
footer.rights: Copyright {year} AG Dental Lab. All rights reserved.

track.title: Track your case in seconds
track.subtitle: Enter the tracking ID provided by the lab to view real-time status and the full production timeline. No account required.
track.readyBody: Enter the case tracking ID provided by AG Dental Lab to view status, dates, notes, and production progress.
track.noStagePhotos: No photos were uploaded for this stage.
track.stageNotReached: This stage hasn't been reached yet.
track.processingBody: Your case has been received and is being processed.
track.noSteps: No production steps have been recorded yet.
